==== circularControlFlowNarrowingWithCurrentElement01.tlua (28 errors) ====

    ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
      next: A | null = null;
      ~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
            ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
              ~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                ~~~~
!!! error TS2364: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access.
    
      constructor(readonly children: (A | null)[]) {}
      ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'constructor'.
                  ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'readonly'.
                           ~~~~~~~~

                                      ~

                                        ~
!!! error TS1005: ')' expected.
                                                
!!! error TS1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
                                                 ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
    }
    
    function getNodes(): A[] {
                         ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
      local out: A[] = [];
                 ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
                       ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
                        
!!! error TS1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
    
      local current: A | null = new A([]);
                     ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
                                    ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
                                      ~
!!! error TS1135: Argument expression expected.
                                       ~
!!! error TS1135: Argument expression expected.
    
      while (current ~= null) {
        local firstChild = null;
    
        if (out.length) {
                ~~~~~~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'length' does not exist on type 'A[]'.
          current = current.next;
          continue;
        }
    
        for i = 0, current.children.length - 1 do
          local child = current.children[i];
    
          if (child) {
            if (!firstChild) {
              firstChild = child;
              firstChild.next = current.next;
            }
    
            child.next = current.next;
          }
        end
    
        current = firstChild || current.next;
      }
    
      return out;
    }
